_comment: Repo-side overrides for the terminal picker, maintained by hand (no master-DB edit needed). 'names' map a PORTMC terminal matchcode to a friendly label. 'modes' force a port's picker mode (terminal|ssy) over the auto value in portmc.json. 'addTerminals' append terminals not in the master PORTMC. 'notes' show a caveat line in the result for that POL.

notes.USLAX: ICTF timing varies (on-dock vs off-dock) and isn't differentiated yet — verify with the desk. Off-dock ICTF routes technically as USLGB (UNIONP 090).

_todo.USLGB: USLGB's two transit sets ARE the on-dock/off-dock split the boss flagged: e.g. JOLIET is 5 days (11 services: PS3,PS6,FTP,CCE,PS1,PS4,PS5,PS8,AL5,MPS,PS7) vs 7 days (WSN,WC6), same ramp UNIONP 170. In the master PORTMC only WSN/WC6 map to a terminal (LONGBE 005 = off-dock); the on-dock services are unmapped, so LGB stays on the flat SSY picker. FIX: map the on-dock services to a terminal (e.g. YUSENT/on-dock) in the master PORTMC and LGB auto-flips to a clean 2-terminal picker (on-dock vs off-dock) — no code change.
